calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-11-2008 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-07-2008 Continued To Jul-11-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Ex Parte Motion For Continuance
Off Calendar Mar-05-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Ferrera for Petitioner.

The matter was unopposed. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court). The hearing on calendar for March 7, 2008 was continued to July 11, 2008 at 9:00 a.m.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-01-2007 Continued To Mar-07-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Aaron Davis appearing for and with objector Cresencia Apelin. John Ferrera appearing for Teresita Servin.
Mr. Davis objected to the petition stating that Ms Apelin was not married to the decedent. Counsel agreed to set the matter for an evidentiary hearing which can be done in half a day. The court set the evidentiary hearing to 03/07/08 9:00 am before Judge John Dearman subject to confirmation.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Bailiff: Rob Harris Clerk: Rosie Noguera
